risks.description: API rate limits restrict agent throughput during peak load
risks.mitigation: Implement request batching, caching, and exponential backoff. Negotiate higher rate limits with ServiceNow.
risks.detection: Monitor API response headers for rate-limit counters. Alert at 80% threshold.

risks.description: Authentication token expiration causes agent failures
risks.mitigation: Implement OAuth2 with automated refresh. Store tokens in secure vault. Proactive refresh 5 minutes before expiry.
risks.detection: Health check endpoint monitors token validity. Alert on auth failures.

risks.description: Agent hallucination produces incorrect fulfillment actions
risks.mitigation: Constrained agent outputs with structured schemas. Human-in-the-loop for all provisioning decisions. Guardrails on action parameters.
risks.detection: Diff agent output against expected schema. Anomaly detection on actions.

risks.description: SLA degradation during migration due to parallel-run overhead
risks.mitigation: Staged rollout with 2-week parallel run windows. Automated SLA monitoring with auto-rollback triggers.
risks.detection: Real-time SLA dashboard. Alert if SLA drops below 5% of baseline.

risks.description: User resistance and low adoption of agent-driven catalog
risks.mitigation: Early engagement with champions. Demonstrate Quick Wins. Comprehensive training program before full rollout. Maintain portal access as fallback.
risks.detection: User satisfaction surveys. Adoption metrics (agent vs portal usage).

risks.description: Skill gaps — team lacks AI/agent operations expertise
risks.mitigation: Hire or contract AI ops specialist. Training program for existing admins. Vendor support agreement for first 6 months.
risks.detection: Incident response time metrics. Knowledge check assessments.

risks.description: Incomplete or stale catalog items cause incorrect agent behavior
risks.mitigation: Pre-migration catalog audit and cleanup. Automated validation rules. Agent confirms item validity before action.
risks.detection: Catalog health dashboard. Item staleness alerts (> 90 days without update).

risks.description: Audit trail gaps — agent decisions not fully logged
risks.mitigation: Structured logging of every agent decision with rationale. Immutable audit log. Regular compliance audits.
risks.detection: Automated audit log completeness checks. Gap alerts.

risks.description: LLM inference latency exceeds SLA thresholds under load
risks.mitigation: Deploy LLM with autoscaling. Cache common responses. Circuit breaker for non-critical decisions. Local fallback model.
risks.detection: Latency percentiles (p50, p95, p99) dashboard. Alert on p95 > 5s.

risks.description: Integration failures cascade across agent fleet
risks.mitigation: Circuit breakers per integration. Bulkhead pattern — isolate agent groups. Graceful degradation (queue requests, retry later).
risks.detection: Integration health endpoint polling. Dependency graph alerting.

risks.description: Data migration errors when syncing catalog state to agent context store
risks.mitigation: Incremental sync with checksum validation. Dry-run before cutover. Reconciliation reports.
risks.detection: Data integrity checks. Row-count comparisons between source and target.

summary: Identified 11 risks: 0 high (score ≥ 15), 11 medium (6-14), 0 low (< 6). Top category: technical.
